glosses.es: en ningún lugar; en ninguna parte
glosses.it: da nessuna parte; in nessun luogo
glosses.yue: 邊度都冇; 冇一個地方
glosses.pt: em lugar nenhum; em parte nenhuma
glosses.vi: không ở đâu; không nơi nào
glosses.ar: لا مكان; ليس في أي مكان
glosses.id: tidak di mana pun; tiada di mana pun
glosses.ja: どこにも; どこにも〜ない

translations.en: I can’t find my key anywhere.
translations.es: No encuentro mi llave por ninguna parte.
translations.fr: Je ne trouve ma clé nulle part.
translations.it: Non trovo la mia chiave da nessuna parte.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的钥匙哪儿都找不到。
translations.ru: Я нигде не могу найти свой ключ.
translations.pt: Não encontro minha chave em lugar nenhum.
translations.he: אני לא מוצא את המפתח שלי בשום מקום.
translations.vi: Tôi không tìm thấy chìa khóa ở đâu cả.
translations.ar: لا أجد مفتاحي في أي مكان.
translations.nl: Ik kan mijn sleutel nergens vinden.
translations.uk: Я ніде не можу знайти свій ключ.
translations.hi: मुझे मेरी चाबी कहीं नहीं मिल रही है.
translations.pl: Nigdzie nie mogę znaleźć swojego klucza.
translations.el: Δεν μπορώ να βρω το κλειδί μου πουθενά.
translations.nb: Jeg finner ikke nøkkelen min noe sted.
translations.id: Saya tidak bisa menemukan kunci saya di mana pun.
translations.sv: Jag kan inte hitta min nyckel någonstans.
translations.da: Jeg kan ikke finde min nøgle nogen steder.
translations.ja: 鍵がどこにも見つからない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; transitive, selects an accusative direct object.
Possessive determiner modifying 'Schlüssel'; masculine accusative singular, agrees with the noun in case/gender/number.
Common noun, masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'finde'.
Negative locative adverb; clause-level modifier indicating absence of a location ('in no place').

translations.en: He gets no reception anywhere around here.
translations.es: Por aquí no tiene cobertura en ninguna parte.
translations.fr: Par ici, il ne capte nulle part.
translations.it: Qui non ha campo da nessuna parte.
translations.ko: 여기 근처에선 신호가 전혀 안 잡혀요.
translations.zh-Hans: 在这附近他哪里都没信号。
translations.yue: 喺呢一帶佢邊度都收唔到訊號。
translations.ru: Здесь у него нигде нет связи.
translations.pt: Por aqui ele não tem sinal em lugar nenhum.
translations.he: באזור הזה אין לו קליטה בשום מקום.
translations.vi: Ở quanh đây anh ấy chẳng có sóng ở đâu cả.
translations.ar: في هذه المنطقة لا تصله إشارة في أي مكان.
translations.nl: Hier in de buurt heeft hij nergens bereik.
translations.uk: Тут поблизу в нього ніде немає зв’язку.
translations.hi: यहाँ आसपास उसे कहीं भी नेटवर्क नहीं मिलता.
translations.pl: Tutaj w okolicy nigdzie nie ma zasięgu.
translations.el: Εδώ γύρω δεν έχει σήμα πουθενά.
translations.nb: Her i området har han ikke dekning noe sted.
translations.id: Di sekitar sini dia tidak dapat sinyal di mana pun.
translations.sv: Här i närheten har han ingen täckning någonstans.
translations.ro: Pe aici el nu are semnal nicăieri.
translations.cs: Tady v okolí nemá nikde žádný signál.
translations.da: Her i nærheden har han ingen dækning nogen steder.
translations.fi: Täällä päin hänellä ei ole kenttää missään.
translations.ja: このあたりはどこでも電波が入らない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person masculine singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; transitive verb taking 'Empfang' as accusative object.
Locative adverb modifying the predicate; sets the spatial frame ('here').
Negative locative adverb modifying the predicate; indicates absence of place ('at no location').
Common noun, masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'bekommt' (signal reception).

sentences.target: In der Anleitung steht es nirgendwo.

translations.de: In der Anleitung steht es nirgendwo.
translations.en: It’s not mentioned anywhere in the manual.
translations.es: En el manual no aparece por ninguna parte.
translations.fr: Ce n’est indiqué nulle part dans le manuel.
translations.it: Nel manuale non è scritto da nessuna parte.
translations.zh-Hans: 说明书里哪儿都没提到这件事。
translations.yue: 說明書入面邊度都冇提到呢樣嘢。
translations.ru: В инструкции об этом нигде не сказано.
translations.pt: No manual isso não aparece em lugar nenhum.
translations.he: במדריך זה לא מוזכר בשום מקום.
translations.tr: Kılavuzda bundan hiçbir yerde söz edilmiyor.
translations.vi: Trong hướng dẫn không thấy nhắc đến điều đó ở đâu cả.
translations.ar: لا يرد هذا في أي مكان في الدليل.
translations.nl: In de handleiding staat het nergens.
translations.uk: В інструкції про це ніде не сказано.
translations.hu: Az útmutatóban sehol sincs erről szó.
translations.hi: निर्देशिका में इसका कहीं भी उल्लेख नहीं है.
translations.pl: W instrukcji nigdzie nie ma o tym wzmianki.
translations.nb: I manualen står det ikke noe om det noe sted.
translations.id: Di panduan tidak disebutkan hal itu di mana pun.
translations.ro: În manual nu e menționat nicăieri.
translations.cs: V návodu to nikde není uvedeno.
translations.da: I manualen står der ikke noget om det nogen steder.
translations.ja: 説明書にはそのことはどこにも書いていない。

tokens.explanation: Preposition heading a PP; governs dative case, introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; determiner of 'Anleitung' within the PP headed by 'In'.
Common noun, feminine dative singular; object of the preposition 'In' ('in the manual/instructions').
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; intransitive; in this construction means 'is written/stands (in ...)'.
Personal pronoun, 3rd person neuter singular nominative; subject referring to the content that 'steht'.
Negative locative adverb; modifies the clause, indicating that the information is present in no location.

sentences.target: Von hier fährt der Bus nirgendwo hin.
sentences.reading: /fɔn hiːɐ̯ fɛːɐ̯t deːɐ̯ bʊs ˈnɪʁɡn̩tvoː hɪn/

translations.de: Von hier fährt der Bus nirgendwo hin.
translations.ipa: /fɔn hiːɐ̯ fɛːɐ̯t deːɐ̯ bʊs ˈnɪʁɡn̩tvoː hɪn/
translations.en: The bus doesn’t go anywhere from here.
translations.es: Desde aquí el autobús no va a ninguna parte.
translations.fr: D’ici, le bus ne va nulle part.
translations.it: Da qui l’autobus non va da nessuna parte.
translations.zh-Hans: 从这里坐公交车哪儿也去不了。
translations.yue: 喺呢度架巴士邊度都唔去。
translations.pt: Daqui o ônibus não vai para lugar nenhum.
translations.he: מכאן האוטובוס לא נוסע לשום מקום.
translations.vi: Từ đây xe buýt không đi đến đâu cả.
translations.ar: من这里 الحافلة لا تذهب إلى أي مكان.
translations.nl: Vanaf hier gaat de bus nergens naartoe.
translations.hu: Innen a busz sehova sem megy.
translations.hi: यहाँ से बस कहीं नहीं जाती.
translations.el: Από εδώ το λεωφορείο δεν πάει πουθενά.
translations.id: Dari sini bus tidak pergi ke mana-mana.
translations.ro: De aici autobuzul nu merge nicăieri.
translations.ja: ここからはバスはどこへも行かない。

tokens.explanation: Preposition heading a PP; governs dative case; marks source/origin ('from').
Locative adverb functioning as the complement of 'Von' ('from here').
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; intransitive; combines with particle 'hin' to form the separable verb 'hinfahren'.
Definite article, masculine nominative singular; determiner of the subject noun 'Bus'.
Common noun, masculine nominative singular; subject of 'fährt'.
Negative locative adverb; modifies the directional predicate, yielding 'to nowhere'.
Verbal particle (separable); directional particle forming 'hinfahren' with 'fährt'.
